title: Trajectories
description: A Minecraft mod that adds a prediction on where a projectile will land.
body:
🎯 Sharpen your aim like never before!
This Minecraft mod brings realistic projectile trajectories to everything you throw or shoot — arrows, snowballs, tridents, eggs, ender pearls, and more! ✨

Before you fire, a smooth, glowing prediction arc shows exactly where your shot will go, making every aim cleaner, smarter, and way more satisfying. 🤩⚡

💻 Client-side magic!
The mod works perfectly on both client and server — and you don’t need the server to have it installed. Even if you're playing on a vanilla server, you’ll still see the trajectory on your own screen. 🎉

✔ Better accuracy
✔ Cleaner aim
✔ Zero server requirements
✔ Maximum fun 🚀

Take your shots with confidence and hit your mark every time!
